# TOREO

> Engineering-led manufacturing partner in Thessaloniki, Greece. Rapid prototyping, 3D printing services, CNC machining, fiber laser cutting, sheet metal forming and welding — from concept to scalable production, under one roof.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.toreo.gr/): Overview of TOREO — design, prototype, manufacture, deliver.
- [Start a Project](https://www.toreo.gr/start): Pick a service to begin your project.
- [Custom Inquiry](https://www.toreo.gr/start-project): Send us your sketch, CAD file or prototype for an engineer-reviewed quote.
- [3D Printing Instant Quote](https://www.toreo.gr/3d-printing-quote): Upload STL/STEP for an AI-assisted instant quote.
- [Track an Order](https://www.toreo.gr/track): Look up order status with your Order ID and email.
- [Company](https://www.toreo.gr/company): Who we are and how we work.
- [Equipment](https://www.toreo.gr/equipment): Machines and technology in our workshop.
- [FAQ](https://www.toreo.gr/faq): Answers about 3D printing, laser cutting, materials, lead times and pricing.
- [Forum](https://www.toreo.gr/forum): Workshop updates — new equipment, materials and announcements.
- [Reviews](https://www.toreo.gr/reviews): Verified customer reviews.

## Services

- [CNC Machining](https://www.toreo.gr/cnc-machining)
- [Rapid Prototyping](https://www.toreo.gr/rapid-prototyping)
- [Custom Metal Parts](https://www.toreo.gr/custom-metal-parts)
